pillars.title: Reliability
pillars.description: Multi-AZ deployment with automated failover. Automated backups with configurable retention. Point-in-time recovery enabled.

pillars.title: Security
pillars.description: Encryption at rest using KMS. Database deployed in private subnets. IAM authentication and SSL/TLS for connections.

pillars.title: Performance
pillars.description: Instance class selected for workload IOPS requirements. Read replicas available for read-heavy workloads. Connection pooling configured.

pillars.title: Cost Optimization
pillars.description: Reserved instances for predictable workloads. Storage auto-scaling prevents over-provisioning. Automated snapshot cleanup.
